sections: Task 2: Apply the canonical contract/dock design freeze
Task 3: Run the complete proof and regression wall
Task 4: Obtain fresh independent final review and resolve accepted blockers
HCM-0.4 crate ownership and dependency contract

repo_truth: Review the exact manifest against baseline HEAD fc4e19e84385063c1ca3678e730c7d3b9e604ad8. The tracked semantic diff is canonical 00-06 only; packet files are unchanged. The proof report records raw counts and command exits for the exact current canonical-plus-packet bytes. Treat it only as verification evidence and independently replay live bytes. Contract membrane and External docks are TargetOnly, all runtime gates are open, canonical 05 is monolithic, and no runtime/schema/Rust/Cargo/HCM-0.6 work is in scope.
allowed_scope: Remain read-only. Replay every manifest entry and the aggregate before review.

Inspect the complete current HCM-0.5 packet, canonical contract/dock sections, seven-file diff from HEAD, final proof report, and only the named frozen dependency sections needed for regression review.
Run read-only Markdown, link, anchor, fenced-example, semantic-table, Git, archive, handoff, and GitNexus checks needed to verify the subject.
Return findings-first structured review through the built-in channel.
non_goals: No edits, staging, commits, new dispatches, global handoffs, ledger writes, or user task hops.
No runtime implementation, schema/validator/dock creation, HCM-0.6, HCM-0.9 repair, catalog decomposition, or shipped-default choice.
Do not infer correctness from the proof report; replay the manifest and assertions.
Do not require optional hardening or a different architecture unless the approved packet demonstrably requires it.
tasks: Invoke required skills in order and remain read-only.
Replay the sorted 11-entry manifest and aggregate fingerprint; stop if any entry differs.

Review cross-document correctness of contract identity/SemVer, lifecycle authority, applicability, evidence qualification/cardinality/freshness/provenance/Resolution/consistency, verdict partition, gate precedence/scoring, and separate local/parent eligibility.

Review exact manifest/bundle/runtime identity, native and bundled-interpreter launch vector/fingerprint, executable/interpreter/application/argv binding, request immutability, host revalidation, and execution-record capture; verify no ambient launch path remains.

Review the ordered first-match host outcome table as a total mutually exclusive mapping. Check cleanup, deadline, cancellation, exit/signal, framing/schema/output, refused/completed, unsolicited cancellation, overlap, and catch-all cases.
Review process framing/isolation/network/timeout/cancellation/refusal/crash/cleanup, candidate admission, and validator-as-witness authority.
Verify the selected JSON Schema target is bounded and its Python runtime is fully bundled/bound without claiming implementation.

Verify the 12-operation inventory and combined mutation classification assign every non-read-only operation exactly once with legal owner/mutability/idempotency/class/condition/cardinality/atomic-group/receipt behavior.
Verify final status wording, seam classifications, canonical monolith, Phase-5 sequencing, proof gate, frozen dependencies, open runtime gates, and no-HCM-0.6 boundary remain coherent.
Independently replay the proof report sufficiently to identify incomplete/fabricated assertions and verify scope/byte integrity.
Report findings first ordered Critical, Required, Optional, Nit, including exact file/line, violated requirement, why, smallest correction, and missing verification.
Return CLEAN only if no valid Critical or Required finding exists; otherwise CHANGES_REQUIRED or BLOCKED. Make no edits.
contracts_and_gates: Documentation freeze only; Contract membrane and External docks remain TargetOnly and runtime proof gates remain open.
Exact immutable contract/lifecycle/applicability/evidence/verdict/gate identities and fail-closed semantics.
Exact typed launch vector closes executable/interpreter/application/argv bytes and order; request and host cannot substitute it.
Every admitted host fact vector maps by ordered first match to one outcome and candidate disposition.
Combined mutation inventory classifies each mutator exactly once and preserves frozen HCM-0.4 transport/idempotency/receipt rules.
Validators/runners/hosts/transports/adapters/Rust bindings never acquire canonical semantic authority.
Frozen HCM-0.2/HCM-0.3/HCM-0.4, HCM-0.9 monolith abandonment, packet bytes, and HCM-0.6 boundary remain intact.
Critical and Required findings block; Optional and Nit do not unless they demonstrate a required contract violation.
stop_conditions: Return BLOCKED if the manifest cannot replay, authority is contradictory, or required proof cannot be evaluated read-only.
Do not modify repository state or write orchestration artifacts.
Do not widen into runtime work, sibling slices, defaults, or catalog decomposition.
